headline: How The PG&E (PCG) Investment Narrative Is Shifting With Evolving Risk And Valuation Views
summary: PG&E’s updated fair value price target sits at US$22.84, a small move from US$22.63, reflecting recent tweaks to analyst models rather than a wholesale shift in outlook. That modest change aligns with mixed research views. Some analysts are focusing on risk reduction and suggesting higher targets in the low US$20s, while others remain cautious on regulation and valuation. Read on to see how these evolving calls might inform your own view of the stock’s risk and reward profile over time. Stay...

headline: Edison International Q1 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
summary: EIX beats first-quarter EPS and revenue estimates, but expenses jump, and operating income falls; 2026 earnings are guided at $5.86-$6.16.

headline: Are Wall Street Analysts Bullish on PG&E Corporation Stock?
summary: PG&E Corporation has lagged the broader market over the past year, yet analysts remain strongly bullish on its future prospects.
